ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Erase all Text Extractor cache data. Use this if you want to re-extract all your files, e.g after a change in language settings.
Be careful that re-extracting all your files can take a long time.
ast.target:
清除所有文本提取器缓存数据。如果您想重新提取所有文件（例如在更改语言设置后），请使用此选项。
\n 请注意，重新提取所有文件可能需要很长时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Text Extractor will use the system OCR instead of Tesseract. The OCR language will be detected automatically.
ast.target: 如果启用，文本提取器将使用系统 OCR 而不是 Tesseract。OCR 语言将自动检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add "Text Extractor" actions to the right click menu in the file explorer.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器的右键菜单中添加“文本提取器”操作。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Don't combine parseLabelsAsHtml and allowUserOptions. It's susceptible to XSS attacks!
ast.target: 不要同时使用 parseLabelsAsHtml 和 allowUserOptions。这容易受到 XSS 攻击！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: MultiSelect's sortSelected and selectedOptionsDraggable should not be combined as any user re-orderings of selected options will be undone by sortSelected on component re-renders.
ast.target: 多选组件的 sortSelected 和 selectedOptionsDraggable 不应同时使用，因为任何用户对选中选项的重新排序都会在组件重新渲染时被 sortSelected 撤销。

ast.target: OCR 语言

ast.name: text
ast.source:
A list of languages to use for OCR. e.g. if your vault contains documents in English and French, you'd want to add 'eng' and 'fra' here.
        This setting only applies to images, not PDFs. You may have to clear the cache after changing this setting.
ast.target: 用于 OCR 的语言列表。例如，如果您的保险库包含英文和法语文档，您需要在此处添加 'eng' 和 'fra'。\n        此设置仅适用于图像，不适用于 PDF。更改此设置后，您可能需要清除缓存。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 浏览器
